name: Detective Holmes: Hidden Objects
short_description: Join Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson in a thrilling detective adventure! Solve mysteries, find hidden objects, and uncover secrets in beautifully detailed scenes. Every clue brings you closer to the truth. Are you ready to investigate?
detailed_description:
Hello, fans of hidden object detective games!

Get ready to dive into the thrilling new adventures of the legendary Sherlock Holmes!

If you're a fan of detective stories, mystery, unexpected plot twists, and clever puzzles, this game is made for you. Join Holmes and his trusted friend, Doctor Watson, as they take on a brand new investigation filled with secrets, suspense, and surprises lurking in every scene.

Inspired by the world of Arthur Conan Doyle, this hidden object game challenges you to test your powers of observation. Search for carefully hidden clues in beautifully detailed environments — from dark streets to warm, old-fashioned rooms. Every object you find could bring you one step closer to cracking the case. Remember, even the smallest detail might be the key to unraveling the mystery.

Features

• Realistic, richly detailed scenes with your favorite classic characters
• A variety of gameplay modes including hidden object searches, spot-the-difference, matching pairs, and more
• Many of the hidden objects are genuine antiques — perfect for vintage lovers
• A relaxing way to train your brain while enjoying a timeless detective adventure
• Easy to use controls, great for both casual players and puzzle fans

Step into the shoes of a true detective and help Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson solve their latest case. Adventure awaits!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Hungarian, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Czech, Japanese
